subject: problem importing to WARP
body:
hi all,
I processed two tilt series identically as per the "quick start tilt 
series" guide on the WARP website. I did *everything *in parallel for the 
two datasets. I aligned movies in WARP, exported stack to IMOD, went 
through the eTomo pipeline for alignment, then re-imported that data into 
WARP for further processing. However, only ONE of the two tilt series will 
import, despite them being processed identically and in parallel. They are 
sitting in the same folder. No idea what could cause this. Here is the 
error.

"object reference not set to an instance of an object".

thanks!
